items.description: Sends email notifications to applicants to inform them that their applications have been approved.
items.name: D4B8 Application Approved, Applicant, Email

subject.en_US: Sweet things are in store for you!

items.description: Sends email notifications to applicants to inform them that their applications have been denied.

items.description: Sends email notifications to applicants to indicate their applications have been received.
items.name: D4B8 Application Received, Applicant, Email

subject.en_US: Thank you for submitting your application!

items.description: Sends user notifications to an administrative role whenever a distributor application is submitted.
items.name: D4B8 Application Submitted, Admin, User
